'''hanasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focometer|focometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focometer|focometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hanasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænæshæth|hænæshæth]] || [[word:hænæshæj|hænæshæj]] || [[word:hænæshæsh|hænæshæsh]] || [[word:hænæshæ|hænæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hananashath|hananashath]] || [[word:hananashaj|hananashaj]] || [[word:hananashash|hananashash]] || [[word:hananasha|hananasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanashath|hanashath]] || [[word:hanashaj|hanashaj]] || [[word:hanashash|hanashash]] || [[word:hanasha|hanasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanafshath|hanafshath]] || [[word:hanafshaj|hanafshaj]] || [[word:hanafshash|hanafshash]] || [[word:hanafshaf|hanafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanashatha|hanashatha]] || [[word:hanashaja|hanashaja]] || [[word:hanashasha|hanashasha]] || [[word:hanashaka|hanashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanashath|hanashath]] || [[word:hanashaj|hanashaj]] || [[word:hanashash|hanashash]] || [[word:hanasha|hanasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanashathal|hanashathal]] || [[word:hanashajal|hanashajal]] || [[word:hanashashal|hanashashal]] || [[word:hanashakal|hanashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanashathatha|hanashathatha]] || [[word:hanashajaja|hanashajaja]] || [[word:hanashashasha|hanashashasha]] || [[word:hanashaka|hanashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanashathan|hanashathan]] || [[word:hanashajan|hanashajan]] || [[word:hanashashan|hanashashan]] || [[word:hanashakan|hanashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanashathaoro|hanashathaoro]] || [[word:hanashajaoro|hanashajaoro]] || [[word:hanashashaoro|hanashashaoro]] || [[word:hanashakaoro|hanashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
